case_summary: Driveway gate motor unresponsive to remote and keypad; control board status LEDs behaving abnormally.

ground_truth.notes: Tests routing of gate motor electronics / control board faults to gate_motor_fault. The mention of LEDs + remote failure should outweigh any keyword pull toward intercom or DB board issues.

inputs.user_text: Our sliding driveway gate motor isn't responding to any of the remotes any more, and the keypad on the wall doesn't trigger it either. When I open the motor casing the small status LEDs on the control board are flashing in a sequence we haven't seen before. The gate itself moves freely if we release the manual override, so the gate isn't physically stuck.
